_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/Makefile.am.planningNote: Automake libmos3_la_SOURCES list. digiTS has no autotools build; MOS3 registers via Mosfet3N/Mosfet3P Definitions in register-all.ts. Both hunks only drop the deleted mos3dest.c/mos3mdel.c source entries (themselves NO-COUNTERPART C-heap-free files).

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3.c.planningNote: IFparm MOS3mPTable[] model-param table - the source of truth for the level-3 model param set; counterpart is mosfet3.ts MOSFET3_*_PARAM_DEFS / modelRegistry.paramDefs. Two hunks flip alias-row flags (delvt0 IOPR->IOPUR; input_delta IOPR->IOP); the aliased params (delvto/input_delta) are present and unchanged. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass (no v26 MOS3 baseline in digiTS to apply onto).

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3acld.c.planningNote: MOS3acLoad AC small-signal companion load -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.stampAc(). AC is implemented (analysis-scope.md; project_ac_solver_unified). Hunk is MOS3nextModel/MOS3instances/MOS3nextInstance accessor-macro renames only; AC conductances/cap admittances unchanged. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3ask.c.planningNote: MOS3ask integer-id IFvalue getter dispatcher (which-id switch returning IFvalue). digiTS has no integer-id ask API - params/outputs are read by name from the property bag / getPinCurrents. Three hunks are MOS3modPtr(here) accessor-macro renames inside the CAPGS/CAPGD/CAPGB overlap-cap getter cases; the underlying quantities exist in the reconstructed device, but the integer-id getter mechanism has no digiTS counterpart (same disposition as dio/jfet2 ask/mask).

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3conv.c.planningNote: MOS3convTest convergence test (cdhat/cbhat current-prediction). In the digiTS unified-interface model the check is folded inline into load() at the Check-flag site (mos3load.c:1045-1051) incrementing ctx.noncon; conceptually Mosfet3AnalogElement.checkConvergence. Hunk is accessor-macro renames only. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3defs.h.planningNote: Instance/model structs + state #defines + param-id enums. Four hunks: h001 noise-source enum + sMOS3instance GENinstance plumbing + const node fields (NC); h002 removes the old noise #define block + surrounds the NONOISE MOS3nVar array (NC); h003 sMOS3model GENmodel plumbing (NC); h004 device/model param-id #define->enum reformat - digiTS has no IFparm integer-id dispatch (params resolve by name). The MOS3 state-slot layout (MOSFET3_SCHEMA, 17 slots) is rebuilt by the reconstruction, not from this header.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3del.c.planningNote: MOS3delete - the v41 form is a C-heap FREE() teardown (FREE(inst->MOS3sens)); the v26 form unlinked one instance from a linked list. digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no instance list, no sensitivity struct. Both hunks are device teardown.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3dest.c.planningNote: Whole-file deletion of MOS3destroy - a C-heap FREE() loop releasing every MOS3model/MOS3instance. digiTS is GC-managed; no model/instance lists. File deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3dist.c.planningNote: MOS3disto distortion stamp, entered only under D_TWOF1/D_THRF1/D_F1MF2/D_F1PF2/D_2F1MF2 Volterra modes. Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename inside the distortion-mode-gated loop.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3dset.c.planningNote: MOS3dSetup distortion setup (precomputes the cross-derivative Volterra kernels consumed by MOS3disto). Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3ext.h.planningNote: C extern-prototype header. The single hunk only removes the extern decls of the deleted heap fns (MOS3destroy/MOS3mDelete) and re-signatures MOS3delete to the GENinstance teardown form. digiTS has no prototype headers; signatures are TS class members. No surviving declaration change with a counterpart.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3ic.c.planningNote: MOS3getic .ic/UIC initial-condition capture (registered as DEVsetic; grabs icVBS/icVDS/icVGS from external node voltages when not given). digiTS has no per-element setic/getic engine hook - DEFER (non-blocking), same disposition as jfet2 getic (OQ-JFET2-GETIC) and mes getic. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3init.c.planningNote: SPICEdev MOS3info dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table - registration is the reconstructed Mosfet3N/Mosfet3P component definitions in register-all.ts, method binding is which methods the element class implements. The only non-cosmetic change is DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (the deleted heap fns); every surviving function-pointer disposition is unchanged. No new slot, default, or capability.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3load.c.planningNote: MOS3load DC/transient companion load - the level-3 semi-empirical drain-current core (moseq3: XJ short-channel, ETA static feedback, THETA mobility modulation, VMAX velocity saturation, KAPPA channel-length modulation) plus bulk diodes, Meyer caps, charge integration and Y-matrix stamps -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.load(). Hunk is accessor-macro renames only; the level-3 arithmetic is unchanged v26->v41. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3mdel.c.planningNote: Whole-file deletion of MOS3mDelete - a C-heap FREE() unlinking one MOS3model from the model list and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model list. File deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3noi.c.planningNote: MOS3noise noise analysis (noizDens[MOS3NSRCS] thermal/flicker densities, NOISE_ADD_OUTVAR plot names). Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). Three hunks: h001 removes a dead char name[] local, h002 accessor renames, h003 NOISE_ADD_OUTVAR macro refactor of the plot-name registration. Whole file belongs to noise.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3par.c.planningNote: MOS3param instance-param setter (m/w/l/as/ad/ps/pd/nrs/nrd/off/icvbs/icvds/icvgs/temp/dtemp/ic) -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.setParam()/constructor. h001 is the cp_getvar("scale",...) signature bump (extra arg) + switch-spacing cosmetics (scale is upstream in digiTS, no cp_getvar global - same convention as MOS1); h002 adds explicit FALLTHROUGH comments on the MOS3_IC vector parse (behavior unchanged, 3->2->1 D-S/G-S/B-S fallthrough). PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3pzld.c.planningNote: MOS3pzLoad(..., SPcomplex *s) pole-zero load - stamps the complex admittance for the PZ sweep. Pole-zero not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3sacl.c.planningNote: MOS3sAcLoad sensitivity AC-load - operates on ckt->CKTsenInfo / info->SENparms / MOS3senParmNo. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity (no CKTsenInfo/SenCond/SENstruct). Two hunks: h001 accessor renames inside the PERTURBATION loop, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3set.c.planningNote: MOS3setup model defaults + per-instance prime-node alloc + 22-cell TSTALLOC (PORT -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.setup); MOS3unsetup node teardown (NO-COUNTERPART - digiTS has no device teardown, engine rebuilt fresh per compile). Three hunks: h001/h002 MOS3setup accessor renames (PORT); h003 the MOS3unsetup drain/source-prime delete-order rewrite (>0 guards) -> NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3sld.c.planningNote: MOS3sLoad sensitivity load - computes charge sensitivities (MOS3dphi*_dl/dw) keyed on info->SENparms/MOS3senParmNo. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Two hunks: h001 accessor renames, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3sprt.c.planningNote: MOS3sPrint sensitivity debug printout (printf of LEVEL 3 MOSFET sensitivity values). digiTS has no sensitivity analysis and no per-device stdout. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3sset.c.planningNote: MOS3sSetup sensitivity setup (SENstruct *info) - assigns MOS3senParmNo into the sensitivity parameter table. digiTS has no SENstruct/sensitivity analysis. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3supd.c.planningNote: MOS3sUpdate sensitivity update - recomputes charge sensitivities (MOS3dphi*_dl/dw) into the sensitivity tables. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Two hunks: h001 accessor renames, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3temp.c.planningNote: MOS3temp temperature pass - model preprocessing (oxideCapFactor, gamma/phi-from-nsub, alpha, coeffDepLayWidth, narrowFactor) + per-instance corrections (tTransconductance/tSurfMob/tPhi/tVto/tVbi/tSatCur, junction-cap temp scaling, vcrit) -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.computeTemperature()/_computeTempInstance(). Two hunks are accessor-macro renames over the model walk (h001) and instance walk (h002). PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

src/spicelib/devices/mos3/mos3trun.c.planningNote: MOS3trunc LTE/timestep - CKTterr on the three Meyer-gate charges MOS3qgs/MOS3qgd/MOS3qgb -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.getLteTimestep() (cktTerr on QGS/QGD/QGB). The single hunk is accessor-macro renames over the model/instance walk. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

mos3/Makefile.am#h001.rationale: Automake libmos3_la_SOURCES fragment removing the mos3dest.c source entry. digiTS has no autotools build; the component is registered via src/components/register-all.ts. The removed entry is itself a C-heap-free file (NO-COUNTERPART). No behavioral content.

mos3/Makefile.am#h002.rationale: Automake libmos3_la_SOURCES fragment removing the mos3mdel.c source entry. digiTS has no autotools build; registration is via register-all.ts. The removed entry is itself a C-heap-free file (NO-COUNTERPART). No behavioral content.

mos3/mos3.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3*Element model param defs (MOSFET3_*_PARAM_DEFS / modelRegistry.paramDefs)

mos3/mos3.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3*Element model param defs (MOSFET3_*_PARAM_DEFS / modelRegistry.paramDefs)

mos3/mos3ask.c#h001.rationale: MOS3ask integer-id IFvalue getter dispatcher, MOS3_CAPGS case (gate-source cap + overlap). digiTS has no integer-id ask API - params/outputs are read by name from the property bag / getPinCurrents. The hunk is MOS3modPtr(here)-> accessor-macro renames inside this getter case; the underlying quantity exists in the reconstructed device, but the which-id getter mechanism has no digiTS counterpart (same disposition as dio/jfet2 ask/mask).

mos3/mos3ask.c#h002.rationale: MOS3ask integer-id IFvalue getter dispatcher, MOS3_CAPGD case (gate-drain cap + overlap). digiTS has no integer-id ask API - params/outputs are read by name from the property bag. The hunk is MOS3modPtr(here)-> accessor-macro renames inside this getter case; the which-id getter mechanism has no digiTS counterpart.

mos3/mos3ask.c#h003.rationale: MOS3ask integer-id IFvalue getter dispatcher, MOS3_CAPGB case (gate-bulk cap + overlap). digiTS has no integer-id ask API - params/outputs are read by name from the property bag. The hunk is MOS3modPtr(here)-> accessor-macro renames inside this getter case; the which-id getter mechanism has no digiTS counterpart.

mos3/mos3conv.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3AnalogElement.checkConvergence (folded inline into load() at the Check-flag site per the unified-interface model)

mos3/mos3defs.h#h001.rationale: Mixed hunk, both halves NO-COUNTERPART: (1) adds the MOS3RDNOIZ/MOS3RSNOIZ/MOS3IDNOIZ/MOS3FLNOIZ/MOS3TOTNOIZ/MOS3NSRCS noise-source-index enum - indices into the MOS3nVar noise-density array consumed solely by MOS3noise; noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). (2) embeds struct GENinstance gen into sMOS3instance and macro-lifts MOS3modPtr/MOS3nextInstance/MOS3name/MOS3states onto gen.GEN*, plus const-qualifies the d/g/s/b node-id fields - pure C struct-layout/dispatch plumbing; digiTS holds instance fields as TS members and state in the reconstructed MOSFET3_SCHEMA StatePool, with no GENinstance base, no IFuid, no instance list.

mos3/mos3defs.h#h002.rationale: Removes the old MOS3RDNOIZ..MOS3NSRCS #define block (relocated to h001's enum) and surrounds the NONOISE-guarded MOS3nVar[NSTATVARS][MOS3NSRCS] noise-density array declaration. Both the removed defines and the MOS3nVar array are noise-only constructs; noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). No consumer in any implemented analysis.

mos3/mos3defs.h#h003.rationale: Embeds struct GENmodel gen into sMOS3model and macro-lifts MOS3modType/MOS3nextModel/MOS3instances/MOS3modName onto gen.GEN*, dropping the hand-rolled linked-list fields. Pure C struct-layout/dispatch plumbing; digiTS has no GENmodel base, no model list, no IFuid - the reconstructed device holds model params as TS members.

mos3/mos3defs.h#h004.functionGroup: mos3/mos3defs.h::typedef struct sMOS3model {       /* model structure for a resistor */
mos3/mos3defs.h#h004.rationale: Device-question and model-parameter id #define->enum reformat (MOS3_W..MOS3_DTEMP and MOS3_MOD_VTO..MOS3_MOD_DELVTO renumbered into C enums, byte-identical values). This is the IFparm dispatch-id table; digiTS has no IFparm ask/param-id integer dispatch - params resolve by name in setParam/paramDefs. No new param, no changed default, no value change (same disposition as jfet2 defs.h#h004).

mos3/mos3del.c#h001.rationale: MOS3delete file-header comment-block removal (drops the empty /* */ block above the includes). Part of the device-teardown file; digiTS has no device teardown (engine rebuilt fresh per compile). No behavioral content.

mos3/mos3del.c#h002.rationale: Rewrites MOS3delete from the v26 linked-list-unlink-and-FREE(here) form to the v41 GENinstance teardown form (MOS3delete(GENinstance *gen_inst) { FREE(inst->MOS3sens); }). digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no instance list, no MOS3sens sensitivity struct. Device teardown has no digiTS counterpart.

mos3/mos3dest.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of MOS3destroy - a C-heap FREE() loop releasing every MOS3model and MOS3instance. digiTS is GC-managed; no model/instance lists. File deleted in v41.

mos3/mos3dist.c#h001.rationale: MOS3disto distortion stamp, entered only under D_TWOF1/D_THRF1/D_F1MF2/D_F1PF2/D_2F1MF2 Volterra modes (CKTcurJob == DISTOAN). Distortion not implemented: no distortion engine file, no distortion AnalogEngine method, no distortion MCP tool (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the linked-list-walk accessor rename inside the distortion-mode-gated loop.

mos3/mos3dset.c#h001.rationale: MOS3dSetup precomputes the cross-derivative Volterra kernels consumed by MOS3disto. Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the linked-list-walk accessor rename.

mos3/mos3ext.h#h001.rationale: C extern-prototype header. The hunk removes the extern decls of MOS3destroy and MOS3mDelete (deleted C-heap-free functions) and re-signatures MOS3delete from (GENmodel*,IFuid,GENinstance**) to (GENinstance*) - the device-teardown form. digiTS has no prototype headers; signatures are TS class members. No surviving declaration change with a counterpart.

mos3/mos3ic.c#h001.rationale: MOS3getic .ic/UIC initial-condition capture (registered as DEVsetic; seeds MOS3icVBS/icVDS/icVGS from external node voltages when not given). digiTS has no per-element setic/getic engine hook - engine-phase-deferred (non-blocking), same disposition as jfet2 getic (OQ-JFET2-GETIC) and mes getic. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename over the model/instance walk.

mos3/mos3init.c#h001.rationale: SPICEdev MOS3info dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table - registration is the reconstructed Mosfet3N/Mosfet3P component definitions in register-all.ts, and which DEV* slots are non-NULL is captured by which methods the element class implements. Examined hunk-by-hunk: every surviving function-pointer assignment is unchanged v26->v41; the only non-cosmetic change is DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (the deleted heap fns). No new slot, default, or capability.

mos3/mos3mdel.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of MOS3mDelete - a C-heap FREE() unlinking one MOS3model from the model list and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model list. File deleted in v41.

mos3/mos3noi.c#h001.functionGroup: mos3/mos3noi.c::MOS3noise (int mode, int operation, GENmodel *genmodel, CKTcircuit *ckt,
mos3/mos3noi.c#h001.rationale: Inside MOS3noise (noise analysis): removes the now-dead char name[N_MXVLNTH] local used to build noise plot names. Noise not implemented: no noise method on AnalogElement, no noise engine, no noise MCP tool (analysis-scope.md).

mos3/mos3noi.c#h002.functionGroup: mos3/mos3noi.c::MOS3noise (int mode, int operation, GENmodel *genmodel, CKTcircuit *ckt,
mos3/mos3noi.c#h002.rationale: Inside MOS3noise: MOS3nextModel/MOS3instances/MOS3nextInstance accessor-macro renames over the noise model/instance walk. The enclosing routine is noise analysis; noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

mos3/mos3noi.c#h003.functionGroup: mos3/mos3noi.c::MOS3noise (int mode, int operation, GENmodel *genmodel, CKTcircuit *ckt,
mos3/mos3noi.c#h003.rationale: Inside MOS3noise: replaces the hand-rolled TREALLOC/IFnewUid plot-name emission with NOISE_ADD_OUTVAR for the N_DENS and INT_NOIZ noise-output cases. Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

mos3/mos3par.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3AnalogElement.setParam() / constructor (instance param setter; scale is upstream, switch-spacing cosmetic)

mos3/mos3par.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3AnalogElement.setParam() MOS3_IC vector parse (3->2->1 D-S/G-S/B-S fallthrough)

mos3/mos3pzld.c#h001.rationale: MOS3pzLoad(..., SPcomplex *s) stamps the complex admittance for the pole-zero sweep. Pole-zero not implemented: no PZ method on the AnalogEngine interface, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

mos3/mos3sacl.c#h001.rationale: MOS3sAcLoad sensitivity AC-load - operates on ckt->CKTsenInfo with SENstatus = PERTURBATION over the state vector. digiTS implements no per-device sensitivity (no CKTsenInfo/SenCond/SENstruct). The hunk is the accessor-macro rename inside the perturbation loop. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3/mos3sacl.c#h002.rationale: MOS3sAcLoad sensitivity AC-load, the SENparms iparmno loop. Adds an (int) cast on here->MOS3sens_l in the (MOS3senParmNo + sens_l) sensitivity-parameter index. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity (no SENparms/senParmNo). Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3/mos3set.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/mosfet3.ts :: Mosfet3AnalogElement.setup() (instance walk / geometry-IC defaults / prime-node alloc / 22-cell TSTALLOC)

mos3/mos3set.c#h003.rationale: MOS3unsetup node teardown - CKTdltNNum on the drain/source prime nodes with the v41 (>0) delete-order rewrite. digiTS has no device teardown; the engine is rebuilt fresh per compile (no CKTdltNNum analogue, no persistent prime-node pool to release). Same disposition as the delete/destroy/unsetup family.

mos3/mos3sld.c#h001.rationale: MOS3sLoad sensitivity load - computes charge sensitivities into the sensitivity tables keyed on info->SENparms/MOS3senParmNo. digiTS implements no per-device sensitivity (no CKTsenInfo/SenCond). The hunk is the accessor-macro rename over the model/instance walk. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3/mos3sld.c#h002.rationale: MOS3sLoad sensitivity load, the sens_w branch (Osxp*_dw stores). Adds an (int) cast on here->MOS3sens_l in the (MOS3senParmNo + sens_l) sensitivity-parameter index. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3/mos3sprt.c#h001.rationale: MOS3sPrint sensitivity debug printout (printf of LEVEL 3 MOSFET sensitivity model/instance values). digiTS has no sensitivity analysis and no per-device stdout. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

mos3/mos3sset.c#h001.rationale: MOS3sSetup(SENstruct *info, ...) sensitivity setup - assigns MOS3senParmNo into the SENstruct sensitivity-parameter table. digiTS has no SENstruct and no sensitivity analysis (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

mos3/mos3supd.c#h001.rationale: MOS3sUpdate sensitivity update - recomputes charge sensitivities (MOS3dphi*_dl) into the sensitivity tables. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. The hunk is the accessor-macro rename over the model/instance walk. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3/mos3supd.c#h002.rationale: MOS3sUpdate sensitivity update, the sens_w branch (sxp*_dw accumulation). Adds an (int) cast on here->MOS3sens_l in the (MOS3senParmNo + sens_l) sensitivity-parameter index. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

mos3#recon/wholeClass.title: Build the complete ngspice MOS LEVEL 3 (semi-empirical short-channel) MOSFET device as a new digiTS analog element (4-terminal D/G/S/B), faithful to the v26 ngspice baseline: the level-3 drain-current core (moseq3 - XJ short-channel fshort, ETA static-feedback threshold shift, THETA gate-mobility modulation, VMAX velocity saturation, KAPPA channel-length modulation), bulk diodes + Meyer caps + charge integration, 17-slot StatePool schema, 22-cell TSTALLOC, the model preprocessing temperature pass (gamma/phi-from-nsub, alpha, coeffDepLayWidth, narrowFactor), AC small-signal load, LTE/trunc, and instance/model param setters. MOS3 does not exist in digiTS today (mosfet.ts is level-1 only); reconstruct to v26 so the v41 diff hunks apply as ordinary per-hunk deltas.
mos3#recon/wholeClass.tsFunction: Mosfet3AnalogElement (setup/load/stampAc/computeTemperature/_computeTempInstance/getLteTimestep/setParam/checkConvergence) + MOSFET3_SCHEMA 17-slot state schema + MOSFET3_*_PARAM_DEFS + Mosfet3NDefinition/Mosfet3PDefinition + src/components/register-all.ts registration (devQmeyer made reachable from mosfet.ts)
